description.value:
You've forged a strong relationship with your ancestors through years of shared customs and fellowship. You feel so close to them that by simply recalling the story of their life and enacting one of their cherished traditions, you can channel a portion of their wisdom into yourself.

Choose one skill to emulate for 10 minutes. You gain a +2 status bonus to that skill and can attempt any skill check that normally requires you to have master proficiency in that skill, and if you're untrained in that skill, your proficiency bonus to untrained skill checks is equal to your level.
